description: Serializer for clustering workflow request parameters.

clustering_job_id.description: If provided, use this clustering job's analysis_level and event_filters instead of request params

clustering_method.description:
Clustering algorithm: 'hdbscan' (density-based, auto-determines k) or 'kmeans' (centroid-based)

* `hdbscan` - hdbscan
* `kmeans` - kmeans

dimensionality_reduction_method.description:
Dimensionality reduction method: 'none' (cluster on raw), 'umap', or 'pca'

* `none` - none
* `umap` - umap
* `pca` - pca

dimensionality_reduction_ndims.description: Target dimensions for dimensionality reduction (ignored if method is 'none')

embedding_normalization.description:
Embedding normalization method: 'none' (raw embeddings) or 'l2' (L2 normalize before clustering)

* `none` - none
* `l2` - l2

event_filters.description: Property filters to scope which traces are included in clustering (PostHog standard format)

hdbscan_min_samples.description: HDBSCAN min_samples parameter (higher = more conservative clustering)

kmeans_max_k.description: Maximum number of clusters to try for k-means

kmeans_min_k.description: Minimum number of clusters to try for k-means

lookback_days.description: Number of days to look back for traces

max_samples.description: Maximum number of traces to sample for clustering

min_cluster_size_fraction.description: Minimum cluster size as fraction of total samples (e.g., 0.02 = 2%)

run_label.description: Optional label/tag for the clustering run (used as suffix in run_id for tracking experiments)

visualization_method.description:
Method for 2D scatter plot visualization: 'umap', 'pca', or 'tsne'

* `umap` - umap
* `pca` - pca
* `tsne` - tsne
